items.briefing:
A new study from CyberPath highlights that significant barriers continue to block people from entering the cyber security workforce in Australia, suggesting the talent shortage may persist without targeted action from training organisations like ours. Separately, a new vision for account-to-account (A2A) payments in Australia has been announced, which could affect how organisations handle digital transactions — though implementation challenges remain.

**Practical tip:** If your team handles online payments or financial systems, keep an eye on updates to Australia's A2A payments framework, as new processes may require staff training or policy updates down the track.

featured.title: CyberPath study says barriers block cyber job entry
featured.quote: Australia's cyber skills shortage worsens as certification costs and unclear pathways deter job seekers.
